Defines Xtalk Calibration modes

Detailed Description

Defines all possible Offset Calibration modes for the device.

◆ VL53L1_XTALKCALIBRATIONMODE_FULL_ROI

#define VL53L1_XTALKCALIBRATIONMODE_FULL_ROI   ((VL53L1_OffsetCalibrationModes) 2)
